If you struggle with ADHD and insomnia, (this is going to sound dumb), but I tried a sleep mask and it is a game changer. I never even realized that ambient light was bothering me and keeping me from falling asleep. So far, I fall asleep much more easily and don't wake up in the night. Amazing.

Today's Gardening Advice: If you're looking for a deep red daylily, Buckyballs is an excellent choice.  The flowers are extremely dark and the foliage tends to be evergreen in warmer climates. It's not especially picky about soil (like most daylilies) but does prefer full sun.  🌱
